questions.question: Which dentists in San Diego Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in San Diego Ca with weekend hours include: Dr MEXICO | Chaparral Border Location (Sat: 09:00-15:00,  Su off), Pure Aesthetic Dentistry (Sat: 09:00-18:00), Dentiland (Sat: 09:00-14:00), Western Dental (Sat: 08:00-16:30), Sorrento Valley Dental Group (Sat: 08:00-14:00), Impression Dental Group (Sat: 07:00-13:00), Dentalia (Sat: 09:00-18:00), Dentalia (Sat: 09:00-18:00) and 2 more. 10 total with weekend availability.
